listing.description:
This residence in the prestigious St Leonards Square offers a lifestyle defined by sophistication and convenience. Showcasing expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, a versatile layout, and uninterrupted views across Sydney Harbour and its surrounds, this apartment is designed for pure indulgence.

Home Features:

- Well-appointed bedrooms with built-in wardrobes
- Master suite with walk-through robe and bath in ensuite
- Open-plan living and dining area with great views
- Modern kitchen with stone benchtops and Miele appliances
- Luxurious bathroom with plenty of storage
- Generous balcony with spectacular views
- Internal laundry with & dryer included
- Study nook, perfect for a home office
- 2 secure car spaces and storage cage included
- Ducted A/C, video intercom and NBN connectivity

There are 29 visitor spaces, 14 car-share spaces, and 18 electronic car charging bays. Resident-only private amenities on Level 2 include a Music Studio, Cinema room, Function & Games Room, Meeting Rooms, Dining Room & Kitchen & and an outdoor landscaped area.

Exclusive resident recreation facilities are located on Level 14 with impressive Sydney Harbour views, including a spa, lap pool, steam room change rooms, yoga studio, gymnasium, and a lounge/entertaining terrace with a BBQ area

Embraced by a highly sought-after Ormeau enclave, 13 Penneshaw Crescent delivers the perfect blend of comfort, convenience and modern family living. This spacious single-level residence has been thoughtfully designed for relaxed, low-maintenance living, all while being just a short stroll from primary schooling, bus stops and leafy parklands. Framed by a rendered façade and tropical gardens, the home sets an inviting tone from the moment you arrive.

Step inside and be welcomed by warm timber-style flooring, a timeless colour palette and a beautiful skylight that fills the entry with natural light. The flowing floorplan unfolds into an impressive series of living and entertaining zones, each crafted to suit the rhythm of busy family life. An open-plan living, meals and family area sits at the heart of the home, complemented by a dedicated formal dining space and a huge rumpus room-perfect for weekend gatherings, kids' play or versatile everyday living.

Movie lovers will adore the purpose-built theatre room positioned at the front of the home, complete with tiered seating and a full projector setup to elevate every movie night into a cinema experience. Centrally located and beautifully appointed, the kitchen offers a superb layout with abundant storage, stainless steel appliances, expansive bench space and both high-bar and breakfast bar seating-all ready to cater for everything from weekday meals to festive celebrations.

Multiple sliding doors create seamless indoor-outdoor connection, opening onto an expansive decked alfresco area. With both sun-soaked and covered zones, it's a standout space for entertaining family and friends while enjoying tranquil views across the large, fully fenced backyard. Designed for low-maintenance living and framed by easy-care landscaping, this is a haven for kids, pets and relaxed outdoor enjoyment.

Privately tucked away from the living zones, four well-sized bedrooms ensure restful retreat for each family member. The master suite impresses with a walk-in wardrobe and a stylish ensuite featuring dual vanities and sleek black fittings. Three additional bedrooms are serviced by a modern family bathroom with a separate bath and shower, while a dedicated study/home office adds excellent flexibility for work or study from home. Additional features include a separate laundry with storage, reverse-cycle air-conditioning and a double remote garage.

Set in a peaceful, family-friendly street, this exceptional home offers unmatched lifestyle convenience. St Teresa's Catholic Primary School, bus stops, playgrounds, bike paths and walking tracks are all within walking distance. Just moments away, you'll also enjoy quick access to childcare facilities, major shopping centres, additional schools and fantastic transport options.

Ormeau is a thriving suburb offering a safe, family-friendly environment with a strong sense of community. Streets are quiet, well-maintained, and patrolled, giving residents peace of mind. Convenience is a hallmark, with easy access to local shops, schools, parks, and public transport, while major highways connect you to Brisbane and the Gold Coast in under an hour. The area is experiencing significant growth, with new residential developments, shopping precincts, and infrastructure projects enhancing lifestyle options and property values. Combining safety, accessibility, and ongoing expansion, Ormeau is an ideal location for families, investors, and anyone seeking a balanced, modern lifestyle.

Move-in ready and designed for effortless family living, this beautifully appointed home is an opportunity not to be missed in one of Ormeau's most desirable pockets.

Property Features:
- 699m² fully fenced block with landscaped surrounds
- Contemporary single-level design in a quiet, family-friendly street
- Open-plan living, formal dining and meals area
- Oversized rumpus room for additional living versatility
- Separate theatre room with tiered seating and projector
- Large kitchen with fantastic bench space, breakfast bar seating and stainless steel appliances
- Expansive decked alfresco entertaining with both covered and open-air options
- Flat, landscaped backyard-ideal for children and pets
- Master bedroom with walk-in robe and contemporary ensuite
- 3 additional bedrooms with built in robes
- Separate home office/study
- Modern family bathroom with separate bath and shower
- Separate laundry with built-in cabinetry
- Reverse-cycle air-conditioning for year-round comfort
- Double remote garage
-11kW solar panel system
- Vacant & move-in ready!

Important: Whilst every care is taken in the preparation of the information contained in this marketing, Ray White will not be held liable for the errors in typing or information. All information is considered correct at the time of printing.

This expansive two storey residence blends family comfort with contemporary design in a highly sought after coastal pocket of San Remo. Inside, the thoughtfully planned layout offers five bedrooms, including a ground floor guest suite with a walk in robe and full ensuite, ideal for extended family or visitors.

Upstairs, the oversized master retreat features a generous walk in robe and private ensuite, while three additional bedrooms include built in storage and share easy access to the central bathroom. A large upstairs living area provides an excellent teen retreat or second lounge and opens to a private, north facing balcony.

The heart of the home is the open plan kitchen, dining and living zone, which flows to a huge covered alfresco designed for year round entertaining with downlights, a ceiling fan and TV/data/power provision. The kitchen impresses with expansive stone benchtops, LED strip lighting and an oversized walk in pantry, perfect for a large family.

Quality appointments include exposed concrete to the driveway, footpaths and outdoor areas, three phase power, CCTV cameras, Tesla car charger, downlights and ceiling fans in all bedrooms, three split system air conditioners, a double garage with internal access, and side gates with wide side access ideal for a boat or caravan. All furniture is included, TVs, fridge, outdoor BBQ and dining setting, offering a ready to enjoy move in experience.

Perfect as a forever family home or a stylish coastal retreat, this property ticks every box. With the beach just minutes away and local cafés, shops and schools close by, this is the San Remo lifestyle you’ve been dreaming of. Call Anthony Clark today on 0448 801 676 to book your inspection.

listing.description:
Positioned in a peaceful pocket of Wallsend, this well-presented three-bedroom home offers the perfect blend of space, comfort and easy-care living. Designed over a single level with a versatile floorplan, it’s an inviting option for families, downsizers or investors looking for a quality property in a convenient location.

A wide entry hall sets the tone, leading through to an expansive open-plan living and dining area filled with natural light. The modern kitchen is perfectly appointed with a large island bench, stainless steel appliances, gas cooking, dishwasher and a full-size pantry, making it ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. Sliding glass doors connect this space to a covered outdoor area, creating a seamless indoor–outdoor flow and a private setting for gatherings.

The master suite is a peaceful retreat with a walk-in wardrobe and ensuite, while two additional bedrooms all include built-in robes. A central bathroom with separate shower and full-sized bath serves the household with ease, complemented by a practical internal laundry with direct yard access. Neutral tones throughout provide a move-in ready feel, while also allowing scope to add personal touches.

Set on a tidy block with a welcoming street presence and established gardens, the property is complemented by a double garage with internal access, ducted air-conditioning for year-round comfort. Close to local shops, schools, transport and parks, this home represents a well-rounded opportunity in a sought-after suburb.

FEATURES:
- Master with walk-in robe and ensuite
- Two bathrooms including full main with bath and separate shower
- Modern kitchen with gas cooking, dishwasher and pantry
- Covered outdoor entertaining area
- Ducted air-conditioning throughout
- Double garage with internal entry and automatic door
- Low-maintenance block with neat gardens and lawns

Land: 342SQM
Council Rates: $456.00 p/qtr
Rent: $700 to $750 p/w

Perfectly positioned in a peaceful, established pocket of Kingston, 18 Tetratheca Drive is a beautifully presented modern home that balances thoughtful design with warmth, comfort, and everyday practicality. Elevated to capture natural light and sweeping mountain views, this residence feels welcoming, calm, and exceptionally well cared for.

Built in 2018 and recently refurbished, the home has been carefully curated with clean lines, bespoke joinery, and a cohesive contemporary palette, creating a timeless and relaxed ambience throughout. The layout itself is a standout feature, offering excellent flow, separation, and functionality for modern living.

At the heart of the home is the stunning designer kitchen, where style meets performance. A striking waterfall stone benchtop anchors the space, complemented by well-designed cabinetry and quality finishes. Cooking is effortless with the 900mm gas cooktop and 900mm oven, providing ample space and power for entertaining, family meals, or passionate home cooks. Perfectly positioned, the kitchen forms the hub of the home, with the lounge and dining areas located on either side, enhancing both connection and versatility.

The lounge is cosy yet light-filled, offering a welcoming space to relax while still enjoying an abundance of natural light. The dining area is generous in size and highly adaptable, easily accommodating larger gatherings and flowing directly out to the north-facing entertaining deck, making indoor-outdoor living seamless.

Throughout the home, thoughtful inclusions elevate both comfort and style. Floor-to-ceiling sheer curtains, tinted windows, and near-new wool carpet feature across multiple rooms, providing privacy, softness, and excellent light control while enhancing the overall sense of warmth and refinement.

On cooler days, the pellet fire becomes an inviting focal point within the living space, delivering warmth and atmosphere with the ease of a single button. Paired with reverse-cycle air conditioning, the home is well equipped for year-round comfort.

Accommodation is exceptionally well-zoned, offering privacy and quiet separation. The master suite is positioned away from the remaining bedrooms, creating a true retreat. It features a custom-built walk-in wardrobe with bespoke joinery and a spacious ensuite designed for comfort and ease. The remaining bedrooms are well-proportioned, each with built-in wardrobes and convenient access to the main bathroom, which is generously sized and beautifully appointed with a frameless glass shower, floating vanity, and a bath thoughtfully positioned within the space.

The newly renovated laundry is both functional and aesthetic, offering excellent storage and thoughtful design that continues the home's cohesive styling.

Outdoors, the home continues to impress. The fully fenced, low-maintenance yard provides privacy and ease of upkeep, while the exposed aggregate driveway offers strong street appeal and ample off-street parking. Multiple outdoor spaces allow you to enjoy the home at different times of day, all while taking in the surrounding outlook and mountain views.

Immaculately presented from front to back, this is a home where every detail has been considered, and nothing needs to be done - simply move in and enjoy.

Kingston remains one of Hobart's most desirable lifestyle locations, offering an exceptional balance of convenience and community. With schools, shops, parks, cafes, and essential amenities close by, and Hobart CBD easily accessible, it's easy to see why families, professionals, and downsizers alike are drawn to the area. 18 Tetratheca Drive delivers not just a beautifully finished home, but a lifestyle defined by comfort, ease, and connection to its surroundings.

Beyond the stunning red brick facade, 196 Edward Street presents the perfect opportunity to secure a Federation style home in Wagga Wagga's CBD with the piece of mind of an A grade level renovation / extension with new plumbing throughout and completely rewired.
Finished to the highest standards with traditional finishes making for a loving family home. Situated within walking distance to Baylis Street and Wagga Wagga's medical precinct, this is one to inspect today!

Currently leased until January 2026 for $800 per week.

FEATURES INCLUDE:

BEDROOMS
Five generously sized bedrooms

BATHROOM
Two stunningly designed federation bathrooms with high quality tapware and finishes

LIVING AREAS
Two living spaces, with a formal living room with a gas log fireplace and an additional
entertaining space to the back of the home, adjoining the kitchen and leading to the
outdoors

KITCHEN / DINING
Beautiful timber kitchen with stainless steel gas appliances and dishwasher. With ample storage and space for any grade of chef. Formal dining room providing a space for the family to meet together whether for nightly dinners or Christmas gatherings with functioning open fireplace

CAR SPACE / ACCOMMODATION
Beyond the electric gate at the front of the property is a driveway with
garage door leading to the double brick garage. With room enough for up to three vehicles off the street and still room enough for storage in the back shed

OUTDOOR
Manicured gardens front and back with synthetic grass to alleviate the pressure and time of maintenance
Irrigated garden beds front and back

CLIMATE CONTROL
Ducted reverse cycle cooling
Gas heating - bayonet and ornamental gas log fireplace

LAND RATES: $2,842 pa

Welcome to 5 Clements Street - a beautifully appointed residence positioned in one of Officer South's most desirable pockets.

As an unlived-in ex-display home, it showcases elevated finishes, thoughtful design and a level of presentation rarely found. The first thing you're greeted by is the master suite, privately positioned at the front and featuring a generous walk-in wardrobe and a beautifully appointed ensuite.

Step inside further and you're welcomed by a bright, inviting atmosphere that instantly reflects the quality on offer. A generous open-plan living and dining zone forms the centrepiece of the home, capturing natural light and offering seamless flow to the outdoor entertaining area.

The kitchen complements this space perfectly, finished with stainless-steel appliances, excellent storage options and a layout ideal for everyday cooking and effortless hosting. A separate second living area adds even more versatility, offering the perfect space for movie nights, a kids' retreat or a quiet breakaway zone when the household needs room to spread out.

The additional bedrooms continue the sense of comfort and scale, with two boasting their own walk-in robes and the remaining bedroom fitted with a built-in robe. They're serviced by a large family bathroom, offering plenty of space for growing families.

Outdoors, a covered alfresco area offers year-round usability, opening to a secure, low-maintenance yard ideal for children, pets, or relaxed weekend living. Comfort is ensured year-round with ducted heating and evaporative cooling, complemented by clean finishes throughout. An oversized double garage with internal access provides secure parking and extra storage.

Perfectly positioned for convenience, the home sits just moments from quality local schools, the M1 freeway, Kaduna Park's growing village amenities and a network of nearby parks and walking tracks - ensuring every day living is effortless.

All information about the property has been provided to Ray White by third parties. Ray White has not verified the information and does not warrant its accuracy or completeness. Parties should make and rely on their own enquiries in relation to this property.

Built with sharp attention to detail and designed for modern family life, 2 Jesamel Place delivers comfort, function, and style in equal measure. Set on 820m² in a quiet cul-de-sac just moments from the coast and the river, this home feels effortless from the moment you pull into the drive.

The exterior sets the tone, a striking mix of dark brick and clean lines, framed by easy-care gardens and a generous double garage. Inside, the design is every bit as practical as it is beautiful. High ceilings, timber floors, and carefully placed windows fill the home with natural light while maintaining privacy.

At the heart of the home, the kitchen is a standout. A large island bench anchors the space, surrounded by quality appliances, a walk-in pantry, and loads of storage. It is built for real life, from big family breakfasts to Friday night drinks. The adjoining dining and lounge areas open onto the covered alfresco, extending the living space outdoors and making entertaining easy.

There is space for everyone here, with three well-sized bedrooms all featuring built-in robes, a main bathroom with clean modern finishes, and a master suite with walk-in robe and sleek ensuite. The separate powder room and dedicated laundry add everyday convenience, and the second living area or rumpus gives flexibility for kids, guests, or a home office setup.

Step outside and the appeal continues, with a fully fenced backyard that offers lush lawn, established veggie beds, and room for kids or pets to run free. It is private, level, and easy to maintain. There is also a large shed for the tools, toys, or weekend projects.

All of this sits in one of West Ulverstone's most peaceful pockets, close to schools, beaches, and the town centre, yet tucked away enough to feel like your own retreat. Whether you are upsizing for more room, downsizing without compromise, or chasing that coastal lifestyle, this one ticks every box.

For more information or to book a private inspection please call the listing agent Kurt Knowles today.

This fresh-faced three-bedder is primed for effortless living in one of Wallsend’s most walkable pockets. From the moment you step through the door, there’s a sense of space, practicality and loads of potential. Whether you're a savvy investor, first-time buyer or just looking for a tidy place to land, this one ticks the “well-located and well-sized” box in bold.

The updated kitchen gleams with high-gloss cabinetry, a bright blue splashback and stainless steel appliances, including a dishwasher and built-in oven. Plantation shutters let in beautiful natural light while giving you full control over privacy. Timber-look floors stretch across the main living zones, offering a neutral palette ready for your personal style.

Each bedroom enjoys fresh paint, carpet underfoot and ceiling fans for comfort. The modernised bathroom is compact and functional with accessibility in mind, featuring grip rails and a walk-in shower. The real surprise though? The flexible rear studio, complete with built-in shelving and extra bench space, making it the perfect spot for a home gym, creative workshop or teen retreat.

Out back, a low-maintenance courtyard means weekends are for relaxing, not weeding. Two sheds provide bonus storage for tools, toys or all your “I’ll get to that later” projects. The street appeal is instant with manicured gardens and a solar system already in place to slash those energy bills. Plus, you’re only minutes from Wallsend Village, schools, cafés and parklands, with Newcastle Uni and the Expressway just a short drive away.

FEATURES:
- Renovated kitchen with stainless steel appliances & electric cooking
- Open-plan lounge & dining with timber-look flooring
- Flexible bedroom/studio with built-in shelving
- Modern bathroom with accessible features
- Two separate garden sheds for extra storage
- Solar panels to reduce energy bills

Land Size: 245 SQM
Council Rates: $535.00 p/qtr
Rent: $550–$600 p/w

listing.description:
Perfectly settled into a quiet cul-de-sac with a welcoming country vibe and family neighbourhood appeal, this gently elevated four-bedroom home hosts contemporary style with effortless lifestyle ease only moments from Castlemaine’s vibrant town centre.

Offering elevated views to Mount Alexander, a contemporary façade and easy care garden introduce the convenience of a single-level floorplan, where a light-filled entry leads you past a generous theatre room and through to the central open-plan lounge and dining perfect for entertaining. Highlighted by extensive glazing that spans the easterly aspect, abundant natural light fills the home and incorporates a well-equipped gourmet kitchen with stainless steel appliances, and effortlessly extends outdoors, where family-friendly gardens offer a serene backdrop to the idyllic north-facing alfresco deck for year-round enjoyment.

Zoned for maximum privacy, a king-sized master hosts a walk-in robe and dual vanity ensuite, with three more robed bedrooms serviced by a central contemporary bathroom featuring a separate bath, shower and WC with a family laundry and conveniently placed walk-in linen cupboard nearby. Complete with ducted gas heating and evaporative cooling, timber look floors, carpeted bedrooms and a remote double garage with side access that appeals to those looking to store a boat, caravan, trailer, or work vehicle, this home’s proximity to Castlemaine’s thriving cafes and shopping precinct as well as quality local schools ensures the best of country living with modern urban convenience.

listing.description:
Perfectly positioned in a highly sought-after Golden Point pocket, this beautifully renovated Federation home places you just a short stroll from Drive Café, local bus stops, and only 1.5km (approx.) from the vibrant heart of the Ballarat CBD. With everyday conveniences and city amenities at your fingertips, this location delivers an exceptional lifestyle opportunity.

Step inside to discover a stunning open-plan living and dining area, highlighted by a soaring pitched ceiling that enhances the sense of space and light. The luxe matte-black kitchen is a true showstopper, featuring timber benchtops, 900mm Smeg appliances, an integrated fridge, freezer, and dishwasher, and a beautiful outlook—perfect for those who love to cook and entertain.

Accommodation includes four spacious bedrooms—three with built-in robes—while the master impresses with a generous walk-in robe and a sleek, contemporary ensuite. All bedrooms are fitted with remote-control honeycomb blackout blinds, ensuring superior comfort, privacy, and energy efficiency. The main bathroom is equally impressive, offering an oversized shower, floor-to-ceiling subway tiles, a heated towel rail, and a freestanding bath complemented by elegant black twist tapware.

Set on a generous 602m2 (approx.) allotment, the outdoor area is designed for relaxed family living, boasting a large decked entertaining space ideal for summer gatherings and overlooking the secure backyard. Green thumbs will appreciate the self-watering wicking bed raised vegetable garden—perfect for home-grown produce year-round. Completing the property is a 3-bay garage with electric roller doors and laneway access—ideal for extra parking, storage, or hobbies.

Additional features include weatherboard charm, single-level ease, sensor hallway lighting, tempered glass power switches, and central ducted heating. If you’ve dreamed of a newly renovated Federation-style home within walking distance to local amenities and the Ballarat CBD, this exceptional property is one you simply must inspect.

Impressive in size, and occupying a prime location in the Harrington Waters Development, this immaculately maintained, generously proportioned Villa offers open plan living areas & a private courtyard. This is low maintenance living at its best.

* Great location in Harrington Waters
* Private courtyard & garden area
* Giant sized master bedroom with air conditioning
* Two other spacious bedrooms, both with built-ins
* Large open plan kitchen, dining & living area
* Air conditioned living area, ceiling fans throughout

* Low maintenance gardens
* Within an easy level stroll to the waterfront walkway & Shoreline Tavern

Opportunities like these do not come to the market very often, enquire today.

Perched high above Doncaster's vibrant skyline, this stunning two-bedroom, single-bathroom apartment at 5002/2 Sovereign Point Court offers the ultimate blend of contemporary style, effortless comfort, and sweeping panoramic views.
Showcasing a spacious open-plan layout, the living and dining area flows seamlessly to a full-width balcony—perfect for entertaining or simply unwinding while taking in the cityscape beyond. The sleek designer kitchen is equipped with quality appliances, stone benchtops, and ample storage, catering beautifully to modern living.
Both bedrooms are generously sized, featuring full height mirrored built-in-robes enhancing light and space throughout.
Additional highlights include a stylish central bathroom, concealed laundry, secure car space with storage, and split-system heating and cooling for year-round comfort.
Located within Doncaster's premium lifestyle precinct, you'll enjoy unbeatable convenience—just moments from Westfield Doncaster, parklands, public transport, and easy Eastern Freeway access.
Whether you're a professional seeking sophistication, a downsizer craving low-maintenance luxury, or an investor pursuing a high-demand address, this apartment delivers the perfect combination of design, comfort, and location.

If you are keen to secure the very best location plus a state of the art brand new residence then your search ends here.

Superbly located just a few minutes walk to local shops, cafes and amenities, this brand new brick residence occupies a generously proportioned, professionally landscaped allotment on its own title, perfect for downsizers or families seeking quality, privacy and low-maintenance living.

The complete package is turn key and move straight in and enjoy pure class, quality and sophistication with the reassurance of 7 star energy rating.

Featuring three bedrooms all with robes, two well appointed bathrooms, two living areas, laundry, ample storage, chef's kitchen with dishwasher and double electric garage.

With top quality fixtures and fittings including double glazed windows throughout, quality blinds, reverse cycle heating and cooling, stone benchtops in kitchen, bathroom and laundry and all to be professionally landscaped.

This beautiful home can be purchased now right off the plan and save thousands of dollars in stamp duty.

Available on request is a full list of inclusions, working drawings and color schemes. Currently under construction with completion due March 2026.

listing.description:
Open plan with 4 bedrooms & family warmth.
A great floor plan for growing families, this relaxed 4 bedroom, 2 bathroom B.V home offers a great casual vibe for entertaining. There is a formal livingroom & modern kitchen/family/eating area. The kitchen & bathrooms have all been renovated.
Highlights - double lockup remote garage, huge alfresco area & self contained one room bungalow for the teenagers or guests.
Family friendly location, close to Schools, Sporting Facilities & Public Transport.

Set in a quiet location, above idyllic Scamander, 23 Pelican Crt is a beautifully presented coastal retreat or your new permanent home. With glimpses of the coast from the deck and bedrooms, and capturing all-day sun, living here or spending lazy holidays will be an absolute treat.

The two bedrooms and two bathrooms make this home an attractive and comfortable home for a small family or couple. The spacious open plan kitchen/dining/lounge area and sunroom provide options for family time and quiet contemplation. With 7kW of solar panels, paying hefty power bills will be a distant memory, as the current owners are mostly in credit on their power bills.

The neat-as-a-pin garden, with chook run and veggie beds, will give you something to do when you're not out fishing, riding or exploring the beautiful coast. There is a double garage/shed and an extra parking space beside the shed for a boat or caravan.

The East Coast has become a mecca for enthusiasts of mountain biking, surfing, fishing, diving and nature loving. With the stunning Bay of Fires just minutes away, along with wonderful bush walking opportunities, cafes, award winning restaurants and a multitude of tourist hotspots within striking distance, you'll love every opportunity to use this as your holiday base, or as your new home.

Zoned General Residential
